stages.description: Evaluate concrete damage and determine repair scope
stages.name: Initial Assessment

stages.description: Clean and prepare the concrete surface for repair
stages.name: Surface Preparation

stages.description: Drill holes for tectonic plate installation
stages.name: Drilling for Tectonic Plate Install

stages.description: Clean and prepare drilled holes for rod installation

stages.description: Install and secure rods for plate mounting

stages.description: Install tectonic plates and secure connections
stages.name: Plate Install

stages.description: Inspect completed repair work
stages.name: Final Inspection

stages.description: Clean and prepare site for handover
stages.name: Site Cleanup

locations.notes:
E - left side rebar
H - right side rebar
